LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HERBERT GUNTHER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON MARCH 5, 2014. MOVING PARTY DID NOT ADD FIVE ADDITIONAL CALENDAR DAYS FOR SERVICE BY MAIL. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING ON DEFENDANT HERBERT GUNTHER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: PER THE ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THE MATTER WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE WONG IN DEPARTMENT 608. THE PARTIES SHOULD CONTACT JUDGE WONG'S CLERK IN DEPARTMENT 608 AT 415.551.3833 TO SCHEDULE A NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 608, DEFENDANT HERBERT GUNTHER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS HEARD AND RULED UPON. THE MOTION TO QUASH IS GRANTED, PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER. THE COURT DIRECTS DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AMENDED DECLARATIONS OF HERBERT GUNTHER AND ELIZABETH GUNTHER PURSUANT TO CCP2015.5, NO LATER THAN MAY-21-2014, AND TO RESUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER, TO DEPT. 608. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (D608)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court vacates the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT HERBERT GUNTHER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS and rules as follows: Per the order of the Presiding Judge, the matter will be heard by Judge Wong in Department 608. The parties should contact Judge Wong's clerk in Department 608 at 415.551.3833 to schedule a new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HERBERT GUNTHER'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was served by mail on March 5, 2014. Moving party did not add five additional calendar days for service by mail. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
